title: Deterministic Model Port, Scripted Fake, Recordings, and Test Identity · Runtime Lens: Recorded Fixtures
summary: Routine tests call a live model, accept semantic drift as flakiness, overwrite golden responses, and cannot prove which request produced a failure. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the recorded fixtures increment in scripted provider fake and versioned interaction fixture set. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, ch…
objectives: Store sanitized versioned provider fixtures with schema, model, API, SDK, timestamp, purpose, and explicit replay limits.
Build a scripted fake that consumes expected requests and emits deterministic model output, tool calls, safety blocks, usage, and faults.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-recorded-fixtures — Store sanitized versioned provider fixtures with schema, model, API, SDK, timestamp, purpose, and explicit replay limits.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-deterministic-model-port-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-deterministic-model-port-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_deterministic_model_port_2(scripted_turns: int = 18, replayed_turns: int = 18, fixture_versions: int = 3, leaked_live_calls: int = 0, unexplained_differences: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if scripted_turns < 8 or replayed_turns < 0:
        return False, replayed_turns, "fake-depth"
    if replayed_turns != scripted_turns:
        return False, replayed_turns, "replay-gap"
    if fixture_versions < 2 or unexplained_differences > 0:
        return False, fixture_versions, "fixture-drift"
    if leaked_live_calls > 0:
        return False, leaked_live_calls, "live-call-leak"
    assert replayed_turns == scripted_turns and leaked_live_calls == 0
    return True, replayed_turns, "deterministic-model-port"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

# Evidence: agentpy-recorded-fixtures-1njxbl
# Competency: agentpy-recorded-fixtures.
# Case 1090: an accessible public-service intake assistant.

def evidence_agentpy_recorded_fixtures_1njxbl(scripted_turns: int = 18, replayed_turns: int = 18, fixture_versions: int = 3, leaked_live_calls: int = 0, unexplained_differences: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:

        "authority1njxbl",
        "interaction1090",
        "toollbxjn1",
        "state1njxbl1090",
        "evaluation10901njxbl",
        "recoverylbxjn11090",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1njxbl)) == 6
    if scripted_turns < 8 or replayed_turns < 0:

    if replayed_turns != scripted_turns:

    if fixture_versions < 2 or unexplained_differences > 0:

    assert replayed_turns == scripted_turns and leaked_live_calls == 0
